name: @pm/capability-agency-lead-scoring
description: agency.lead-scoring capability — owns LeadScoringConfig.currentTotalLeadsScored rollup via graph-inferred topology. Subscribes to agency.lead.qualified and similar lead-progression events; resolves the scoring config by walking the graph (lead -> lead_scored_by -> config OR lead -> lead_assigned_to_user -> user_default_scoring -> config). No scoring_config_id on the lead payload — topology is the contract. G4 anti-fixation proof that the wedding-budget capability shape transfers to a non-wedding profile with no substrate edits.
